overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked futuristic urban plaza at night. The environment features heavy rainfall, reflective wet surfaces, and vibrant neon lighting in green, pink, and purple hues. The player navigates through open plazas, ascends stairs, and passes under covered walkways with holographic advertisements and distinctive cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central escalator structure

events.description: begin ascending stairs toward upper plaza level
green neon pillar temporarily blocks right side of frame

agents.ego_description: walking through rainy plaza toward escalator structure, passing concrete planters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking past camera from right to left

entered.detail: large dark escalator with blue accent lighting and metallic sides
tall vertical strips of bright green neon lighting
large glowing advertisement screen showing animated content
rectangular white concrete seating structure with flat top

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rain-soaked futuristic plaza with heavy downpour and reflective wet tiles. The player walks forward toward a large escalator structure while passing a pedestrian in a white jacket. Green neon pillars line the right side, and holographic advertisements glow in the distance. The camera ascends stairs, moving closer to the upper level while rain continues to fall heavily.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza with neon-lit decorative trees

events.description: camera turns right to navigate around central plaza structure
ambient lighting shifts from green to vibrant pink and purple neon

agents.ego_description: traversing upper plaza level, turning toward area with pink neon lighting and decorative trees

entered.detail: stylized tree with bright pink illuminated foliage and twisted trunk
building overhang with intense pink neon lighting underneath
wide steps with wet reflective surface leading to lower level

segments.scene_description: Having ascended to the upper plaza, the scene reveals a cyberpunk environment with a distinctive pink-leaved tree at its center. The lighting shifts dramatically to pink and purple neon as the player turns right. The area features wide concrete stairs and building facades with changing neon colors. The rain continues to fall heavily, creating reflections on all surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with red structural beams

events.description: enter dark underpass with red neon structural elements and reduced visibility
exit through concrete archway into semi-covered commercial area

agents.ego_description: moving through dark corridor with red neon structural elements, passing under concrete overpass

entered.detail: diagonal support beams with red neon accent lighting
large curved tunnel entrance leading to covered plaza
concrete underside of elevated structure with rain dripping from edges

segments.scene_description: The player enters a darker, enclosed underpass with prominent red structural beams on the left. The environment becomes sheltered from the rain, though water still drips from the concrete overpass ceiling above. Moving through a curved concrete archway, the scene transitions from the dark corridor to a semi-covered commercial plaza with distant shop lights visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial plaza with advertisement pillars

events.description: turn left toward large cylindrical advertisement pillar
begin ascending steep staircase with blue edge lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through covered commercial area past advertisement pillars and shop fronts, then ascending stairs

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking near shop fronts on the right

entered.detail: cylindrical column with 'PSYCHONAUT' text and large face image, illuminated from within
storefronts with purple and pink neon lighting and glass windows
steep stairs with blue neon edge lighting and metal railings
long purple neon light strip hanging from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a covered commercial plaza featuring a prominent cylindrical advertisement pillar displaying 'PSYCHONAUT' branding. The area has shop fronts with vibrant neon lighting on the right and a hanging purple neon tube overhead. The player walks past the pillar and approaches a steep staircase with blue edge lighting, beginning to ascend as the video ends. A few distant pedestrians are visible near the shops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-drenched futuristic city, moving from an open, neon-lit plaza into a sheltered commercial district. It begins by navigating a wet plaza under a heavy downpour, passing green neon pillars and a pedestrian before ascending a set of stairs toward an upper level. As the camera reaches the top, the environment shifts into a vibrant display of pink and purple neon centered around a distinctive pink-leaved tree. The scene then transitions from the open rain into a darker, enclosed underpass characterized by red structural beams and dripping concrete, eventually curving through an archway into a semi-covered commercial area. Finally, the camera passes a cylindrical Psychonaut advertisement pillar and vibrant shop fronts before beginning to climb a steep staircase accented with blue edge lighting.
